channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: NBA All-Stars split on new tournament format
item.description: The NBA's brightest stars tried a new All-Star Game format on Sunday night in San Francisco. Stephen Curry, Damian Lillard and others had thoughts afterward.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame are No. 1 seeded teams in first NCAA Tournament reveal
item.description: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame would be the No. 1 seeds in the women's NCAA Tournament if it began now. The NCAA basketball selection committee on Sunday did its first reveal of the teams in line for the top 16 seeds.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The All-Star verdicts are in, and the player reaction to the mini-tournament is mixed
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The verdicts were mixed, as would be expected. The NBA's All-Star Game mini-tournament is now complete, Shaq's OGs getting the win in the four-team, three-game event where the first squad to score 40 points in each game got the victory. Some players liked it. Some didn't.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Owner/driver Jimmie Johnson notches his best Daytona 500 finish since winning the race in 2013
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Jimmie Johnson was simultaneously relieved and overwhelmed as he climbed out of his No. 84 Toyota at Daytona International Speedway on Sunday night. It was a different set of emotions for the seven-time NASCAR champion and the two-time Daytona 500 winner.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Padres baseball season in San Diego kicks off March 27 with opening series, East Village Block Party
item.description: The Padres are gearing up for the start of baseball season in San Diego and fans can get excited with the free East Village Block Party that takes place during opening weekend.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Vanderbilt's Mikayla Blakes scores NCAA Division I freshman record 55 points in win over Auburn
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Vanderbilt's Mikayla Blakes scored a Division I women's freshman record 55 points on Sunday in a 98-88 overtime victory over Auburn. Blakes, a 5-foot-8 guard who is averaging 21.8 points, shot 15 for 28 from the field with two 3-pointers and made 23 of 24 free throws.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NCS basketball playoffs 2025: Boys, girls first-round schedule
item.description: North Coast Section basketball playoffs begin Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday across seven divisions, including Open.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: It's not just Shiffrin and Vonn. The US Ski Team has multiple medal contenders for the Olympics
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — A year before the Winter Olympics, the U.S. Ski Team just had a performance to remember. The women’s squad won medals in four out of five events at the world championships in Austria and also had two fourth places.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jesse Love wins NASCAR Xfinity Series opener in Daytona following frontrunner Hill's engine failure
item.description: Austin Hill looked well on his way to a fourth win at Daytona before the engine in his #21 car gave out, ending his night early.
item.dc:creator: Mike Costanza, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Final field of 41 set for Daytona 500; Bubba Wallace, Austin Cindric win Duels
item.description: This Sunday at 1:30 p.m., the NASCAR series kicks off with the legendary Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Two-time All-Star Joey Gallo agrees to minor league contract with the White Sox
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Two-time All-Star Joey Gallo agreed to terms on a minor league contract with the Chicago White Sox on Thursday that includes a non-roster invite to spring training.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Central girls & Grand Junction boys secure wins in rivalry showdown
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — In a thrilling matchup that went to overtime, the Central Warriors edged out Grand Junction 55-51, securing their sixth win of the season. Tied at 44 heading into the extra period, Bianca Berens opened with a mid-range jumper to give Central the lead.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: UCSD student gets the job of a lifetime at Genesis Invitational
item.description: Ruth Nguyen, an 18-year-old student at UCSD, earned the opportunity to announce the names of golf stars at The Genesis Invitational through the TGR Foundation, founded by Tiger Woods, and its Earl Woods Scholarship program.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: CMU Men's Wrestling "Battle in Brownson" recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) —Western Colorado Tops Colorado Mesa in ‘Battle in Brownson’ In a heated rivalry matchup inside Brownson Arena, the Colorado Mesa Mavericks faced off against the Western Colorado Mountaineers in the annual Battle in Brownson.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Nick Pivetta agrees to $55 million, 4-year contract with San Diego Padres, AP source says
item.description: Nick Pivetta became the last of the high-profile free agent pitchers to reach an agreement this offseason, a backloaded $55 million, four-year contract with the San Diego Padres, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Holmoe will be a part of search for his replacement
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After 20 years on the job, Tom Holmoe decided this past summer that this would be his last year as BYU's athletic director. "I made the decision in July of this year," Holmoe said at his retirement press conference Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Soccer: University City 4, Madison 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Girls soccer University City beat Madison 4-0 on senior night for the Warhawks. Sofia Christensen scored twice for the Centurions.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: It's a busy week in Colorado Mesa Maverick country
item.description:
Men’s Basketball. Women’s Basketball. Men’s Wrestling. Baseball. Softball. Swimming. Men’s Lacrosse. Women’s Lacrosse.
All eight of those teams are in action this week.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Egor Demin leads BYU past West Virginia, 73-69
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.V. (ABC4 Sports) - Freshman Egor Demin scored 16 points to lead BYU to a 73-69 win over West Virginia on Tuesday night. Kanon Catchings added 11 points for BYU (16-8, 7-6 Big 12). "Gutsy win by our guys," said BYU head coach Kevin Young.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boxing mogul in talks to stage fight at Alcatraz in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- Five years ago, no one would have thought YouTuber Jake Paul would get in the ring last fall with Mike Tyson -- who is a boxing legend but has been retired for nearly 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: NBA All-Star 2025 tip-off party canceled due to weather
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The official NBA All-Star 2025 tip-off party, which was set to take place Thursday at Thrive City has been canceled due to weather. The event was due to take place between 5 p.m. and 9 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Thoughts on the Chicago Bears from around the NFL on Radio Row during Super Bowl week
item.description: Chicago Bears new head coach Ben Johnson is expected to bring a fresh perspective to the team, while quarterback Caleb Williams is expected to elevate his game with the help of Johnson's expertise.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: UPenn could face civil rights violation after trans athlete ban
item.description: It follows President Donald Trump's executive order banning transgender women from competing in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Ex-MLB player Jacque Jones has high school jersey retired
item.description: Jacque Jones, a former Major League Baseball outfielder and San Diego native, had his legacy cemented in his alma mater's history on Saturday with the official retirement of his jersey number.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Member of Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show won't face charges for flag protest
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The cast member who displayed the Palestinian flag with the word “GAZA” in protest during Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show will not face charges, New Orleans police said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
